chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P.No.D-353 of 2023 --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE(S) OF JUDGE(S) ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- 1.For hearing of Misc.No.1414//2023 2.For hearing of main case. 28.02.2025 Mr.Naveed Anjum, Advocate for the Petitioner. Ms.Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General. Mr.Ashraf Ali Butt & Ms.Remat-un-Nisa, Advocates for Respondent No.3 This matter is squarely covered by a Division Bench Judgment of this Court reported as 2022 CLC 2002. Be that as it may, learned counsel for the Respondent No.3 (Cantonment Board Faisal) appears not to be familiar therewith or he is of the opinion that the same is not binding. Let the respondent No.3 (Executive Officer, Cantonment Board Faisal, Karachi) be present in person along with written explanation on the next date. To come up on 07.03.2025. Judge Judge nasir
